items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.6 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Minnesota Twins, KC 3, MIN 5. Jac Caglianone led the night, 2-3 | 2B, BB, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.6 mph.
items.title: Royals at Twins Recap
